test_cases.title: Validate memory usage under high websocket connection load
steps: Establish high number of simultaneous websocket connections to the server
Simulate continuous real-time notifications sent over the connections for 48 hours
Monitor server memory allocation and usage metrics during the test period
test_cases.expected_result: Server memory usage remains stable without increase leading to pod restarts over the 48-hour test duration

test_cases.title: Verify websocket notification delivery correctness under memory leak fix
steps: Connect multiple clients to websocket server
Send diverse real-time notifications from backend
Confirm clients receive all notifications without delay or loss
test_cases.expected_result: All connected clients receive real-time notifications correctly and timely with no data loss

test_cases.title: Check server stability and pod lifecycle after memory leak fix under concurrent load
steps: Deploy websocket server with fix in a controlled environment
Apply concurrent load with realistic connection and messaging patterns for 72 hours
Observe server and pod stability, verify no unexpected restarts or crashes
test_cases.expected_result: Server remains stable with zero pod restarts and no memory leaks detected during load period

test_cases.title: Run automated regression suite to verify no side effects on dependent services
steps: Execute full regression automated test suite on all Core Platform Services
Review results for failures or anomalies indicating impact from memory leak fix
test_cases.expected_result: No regression defects or service impact found related to websocket server memory leak fix

test_cases.title: Validate logging and alerting behavior for memory usage metrics
steps: Trigger high load scenario on websocket server
Verify memory usage logs are generated accurately
Check alerting system triggers notifications if thresholds exceeded
test_cases.expected_result: Logs correctly capture memory data and alerts raise timely notifications on breaches
